description: MTurk HIT configuration for hate speech detection dataset annotation. Complete all [TO COMPLETE] fields. If you believe the study requires IRB approval or additional worker protections, reflect this in the relevant fields.
pi: Dr. S. Chowdhury, NLP Lab, Department of Computer Science

content_types: Posts containing offensive language or slurs (approx. 35%)
Posts containing explicit hate speech targeting protected groups (approx. 15%)
Posts containing threats or incitement to violence (approx. 10%)
annotation_dimensions: Target group (multi-label: race/ethnicity, religion, gender, sexual orientation, disability, other, none)

common_rule_45_cfr_46.applicability: 45 CFR 46 (the Common Rule) applies to research involving living humans through systematic interaction or intervention, including interaction via digital platforms. Contractor or payment status does not determine human subjects status.
common_rule_45_cfr_46.irb_requirement: Research involving human subjects requires IRB review and approval (or documented exemption determination) before data collection begins.
common_rule_45_cfr_46.relevant_excerpt: Research means a systematic investigation, including research development, testing, and evaluation, designed to develop or contribute to generalizable knowledge. Activities that meet this definition constitute research for purposes of this policy, whether or not they are conducted or supported under a program that is considered research for other purposes. [45 CFR 46.102(l)]

worker_welfare.occupational_health_evidence: Peer-reviewed occupational health research documents that content moderators and crowdsourced annotators exposed to hate speech, violent content, and graphic imagery show elevated rates of psychological distress, intrusive thoughts, burnout, and PTSD-like symptoms. (Steiger et al. 2021, CSCW; Roberts 2016, UCLA; Woebot Health 2022 annotator wellbeing survey.)
worker_welfare.minimum_wage_note: At $0.05/HIT and an estimated 30 seconds per HIT, the implied hourly rate is $6.00/hour. Federal minimum wage is $7.25/hour. State minimum wages in California ($16.50), New York ($16.00), Washington ($16.28) and others significantly exceed this rate.
